titleStmt.title: SII 22.56: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 56. (A.R. No. 56 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUMAYĀNAM. BRAHMAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA. TRIBH. VĪRARĀJĒNDRADĒVA—6th YEAR (A.D. 1068-9)

summary.p: This records a gift of 6 mā of land after reclamation (from sandy mound) at a place called Tirumayānaviḷāgam as provision for the daily supply of ghee for a perpetual lamp in the temple, by Ambalakkūttaṉ, a resident of Karuppūr in Marugalnāḍu, a division of Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu. In continuation of the above is an inscription of the 8th year of Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa recording the joint gift of a lamp to the temple by two ladies.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . [ tribhuvanacca] kkaravarttikaḷ śrīvirarā[ jendiṟate] varkku yāṇṭu 6vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ākkūrnāṭṭu tirukkaṭavūr Uṭaiyār tirumayāṉamuṭaiya
perumāḷ koyilil keyamāṇikkavaḷanāṭṭu marukalnāṭṭuk karup pūruṭaiyāṉ Amalaṉ Ampalakkūttaṉā pālar Ittevarkkuc cantirātittavaṟ cella Ivvā
ṭṭai cittiraimātamutal vaitta tirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟukku naā ḷ Oṉṟukku naṟuney Uḻakkāka veṇṭukaikku Ittevar civanāmattukkāṇiyāṉa tevatāṉamāṉa tirumayāṉaviḷākattu maṇaṟkuṉṟil viḷainilamākak kalli viṭṭa nilam Āṟu mā ...

śrī kulottuṅkacoḻa
tevarkku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu
tirukkaṭavūr veḷḷāṉ kaṭavūruṭaiyā
ṉ poṟkāṭaṉ Akamuṭaiyāḷ coṟāṇṭi
viḷakku n=ta Ivaḷ marumakaḷ peṟṟāṇṭi viḷakku va .
Digital edition of SII 22.56 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
